summary: Classified #93081 as the only actionable open candidate in this cluster. It remains the canonical unresolved Windows foreground Ctrl+C report, but no close, merge, or fix-PR action is safe from this run because current main only proves ordinary delivered SIGINT handling and the native Windows npm-global Ctrl+C delivery path is still unverified.
needs_human: #93081 needs maintainer direction or native Windows npm-global proof before Clownfish queues a fix PR. The unresolved decision is whether to wait for real Windows Ctrl+C reproduction or authorize a narrow investigation/fix lane despite current main already handling delivered SIGINT.
